principles: preserve existing paths unless migration is explicitly approved
prioritize retrieval clarity, runtime reliability, safety, and maintainability
add helper files only when they reduce deterministic repeated work
validate descriptions, body length, JSON, helper syntax, tests, and secret risk before PR

recommended_prs.title: Index and retrieval hygiene
scope: Reconcile Skills/index.json coverage for folder-based packages
Document retained standalone skills that are intentionally legacy or unindexed
acceptance_criteria: Every folder-based Skills/*/SKILL.md package has an index entry or documented exception
Descriptions follow the repo's under-300-character nebulaONE trigger target where applicable
No skill files are moved or deleted

recommended_prs.title: DOCX and PDF progressive-disclosure remediation
scope: Review large DOCX and PDF legacy skills
Identify content that can move to docs/references without weakening runtime behavior
Clarify validation, file naming, and failure handling
Preserve public paths unless migration is approved
acceptance_criteria: Mandatory runtime behavior remains loaded in the skill body
Body size is reduced or explicitly justified
File-generation validation and versioning rules are explicit
No destructive actions are allowed without confirmation

recommended_prs.title: Spreadsheet skill consolidation decision
scope: Compare legacy Skills/skills-xlsx.md with folder package Skills/xlsx/SKILL.md
Choose cross-link, deprecation note, or merge plan
Update Skills/index.json to match the active strategy
acceptance_criteria: No ambiguous duplicate trigger behavior remains undocumented
Index reflects active spreadsheet skill routing
No deletion occurs without explicit approval
